heading: Contracts for transportation of mail by vessel
label: 5605 Contracts for transportation of mail by vessel
text: The Postal Service may contract for the transportation of mail by vessel without advertising for bids.
notes: Amendments2006— struck out “for periods of not in excess of 4 years” before period at end.Pub. L. 109–438
Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
amendments: Amendments2006— struck out “for periods of not in excess of 4 years” before period at end.Pub. L. 109–438
